title: Regional League soccer to kick off Saturday
description: REGIONAL NEWS - Good news for local soccer...
bodyText:
REGIONAL NEWS - Good news for local soccer supporters who have faced a three-month drought: the Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League kicks off this coming weekend.


> Three teams, La Liga (Knysna), Kabo Yellow (Plettenberg Bay) and Fast Eleven from George, gained promotion to the elite Safa Eden Regional League for the 2024/25 season.


The Safa HollywoodBets Regional League teams for the 2024/25 season are:

Bitou Young Pirates (Plettenberg Bay), Kabo Yellow (Plettenberg Bay), Black Cats (George), Simunye (George), Fast Eleven (George), Madibaz Football (George), FC United (Knysna), Red Eagles (Knysna), FC Rebels (Knysna), Voota FC (Knysna), La Liga (Knysna), Smuts United (Knysna), Moonlight (Dysseldorp), Peace Makers (Mossel Bay), Benfica (Mossel Bay) and Sea Birds (Mossel Bay).

The teams set to compete this coming weekend are:

Reigning champions Bitou Young Pirates vs Red Eagles (11:00, Kwanokuthula Stadium)

Runners-up Black Cats vs Madibaz Football (11:00, NMU Sports Facility in George)

Simunye FC vs Sea Birds (11:00, Lawaaikamp Stadium)

Moonlight vs Fast Eleven (11:00, Dysseldorp)

Peace Makers vs Benfica (11:00, Extension 23, Mossel Bay)

La Liga vs Kabo Yellow (11:00, Loerie Park B)

Voota FC versus FC Rebels (11:00, Safe Hub)

Smuts United vs FC United (11:00, Smutsville sport facility, Sedgefield)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
